headline: 1 Growth Stock with All-Star Potential and 2 We Avoid
summary: Growth is oxygen. But when it evaporates, the consequences can be severe - ask anyone who bought Cisco in the Dot-Com Bubble or newer investors who lived through the 2020 to 2022 COVID cycle.

raw.headline: 1 Growth Stock with All-Star Potential and 2 We Avoid
raw.summary: Growth is oxygen. But when it evaporates, the consequences can be severe - ask anyone who bought Cisco in the Dot-Com Bubble or newer investors who lived through the 2020 to 2022 COVID cycle.

headline: NRG's Gaudette on Iran Conflict, Investor Outlook and Data Center Demand
summary: NRG Energy incoming CEO Rob Gaudette discusses the impact of the Iran conflict on strategy and investor outlook, as well as data center-driven energy demand with Bloomberg's Julie Fine at CERAWeek in Houston.

raw.headline: NRG's Gaudette on Iran Conflict, Investor Outlook and Data Center Demand
